steps.title: Find the length of the rectangle
steps.content:
The width is 5 cm. The length is 30 cm longer than the width, so:
$$\text{Length} = 5 + 30 = 35 \text{ cm}$$

steps.title: Calculate the area
steps.content:
Use the rectangle area formula:
$$A = \text{length} \times \text{width} = 35 \times 5 = 175 \text{ square cm}$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
